# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a React application. Install Node.js, run npm install, build the production bundle with npm run build, and serve it with a lightweight HTTP server. Keep the Dockerfile simple and easy to understand for our team.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

# Use official Node.js 14 image as base
FROM node:14

# Set working directory in container
WORKDIR /app

# Copy package.json to current directory
COPY package*.json ./

# Install dependencies
RUN npm install

# Copy remaining application code
COPY . .

# Build production bundle
RUN npm run build

# Expose port 80 for HTTP server
EXPOSE 80

# Run command when container starts
CMD ["npm", "run", "start"]
